bio:
With a degree in Artificial Intelligence, my approach to engineering is centered on pragmatism and bringing solutions to production.

My three years as a Data Engineer exposed me to the realities of the industrial field, where I automated complex workflows and improved the reliability of data reporting. In parallel, my entrepreneurial experience pushed me to master the entire product lifecycle, from full-stack architecture to technical iterations based on real customer feedback.

Today, I aim to apply this comprehensive vision — from raw data to the user interface — to ambitious projects.
